headline: IFF Launches PureStrong™, a Probiotic Made Specifically for Dogs
summary: NEW YORK, April 02, 2026--IFF (NYSE: IFF)—a global leader in flavors, fragrances, food ingredients and health & biosciences—is introducing PureStrong™, a new probiotic developed exclusively for canine digestive health.
